nodes.name: Hydrornis
nodes.summary: Hydrornis（Hydrornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如双辫八色鸫、栗头八色鸫、蓝枕八色鸫等13种鸟类。

nodes.name: Bornean banded pitta
nodes.summary: Bornean banded pitta（Hydrornis schwaneri）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Bornean banded pitta。

nodes.name: Bornean banded pitta
nodes.summary: The Bornean banded pitta (Hydrornis schwaneri) is a species of bird in the family Pittidae. It is found only in Borneo. It was formerly considered conspecific with the Javan and Malayan banded pittas. Together, they were referenced as the banded pitta. References Rheindt, F.E., and J.A. Eaton. 2010. Biological species limits in the Banded Pitta Pitta guajana. Forktail number 26: 86–91.
nodes.shortSummary: The Bornean banded pitta (Hydrornis schwaneri) is a species of bird in the family Pittidae. It is found only in Borneo.
